Home›Practice areas›Divorce & Family

Georgia, statewide

Divorce & Family Lawyers in Georgia

629 listings statewide

Compare top rated divorce & family lawyers across Georgia. We list 629 family & divorce practices, both established law firms and solo attorneys, with ratings, reviews, and direct contact. Georgia requires at least one spouse to have lived in the state for six months before filing for divorce. Family lawyers handle custody, child support, alimony, and the division of marital property.

Frequently asked questions

How many divorce & family lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 629 divorce & family lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a divorce & family lawyer in Georgia?

Georgia requires at least one spouse to have lived in the state for six months before filing for divorce. Family lawyers handle custody, child support, alimony, and the division of marital property.

Who is a top divorce & family lawyer in Georgia?

Sarah White, Attorney at Law in Woodstock is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 177 reviews.

Attorney advertising. Georgia Lawyer Directory is an independent directory, not a law firm or lawyer referral service, and does not provide legal advice or endorse any attorney. Listings marked Premium are paid placements; rankings reflect ratings and verified reviews and are not for sale. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome. Contacting an attorney through this site does not create an attorney client relationship.
